title: Weskerson's 3d (patch Compatibility) for Bray & Cyber's 3D Books
description: This is a version of Weskerson's 3D Items compatible with Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Books
body:
**Here is a simple version** of Weskerson's 3D Items that remove every book related things so you could use both Fresher 3D books and Weskerson's 3D Items.
(HMI with Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Book normally can't work with Weskerson's 3D Items.) 

**This ressource pack only contain Weskerson's 3D Items, you still have to download Fresher 3d Books.**

_Creators of [Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bray-cyber-3d-enchanted-books) :_ [Braytonks](https://modrinth.com/user/Braytonks) & [Cyber](https://modrinth.com/user/cyber)

_Creator of [Weskerson's 3D Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-utils) :_ [Weskerson](https://modrinth.com/user/weskerson)

**Load order should be**
- Weskerson's 3D Items
- Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Books, Better,
- Fresher 3D books X HMI compat



All rights reserved
to Weskerson (creator)

**You have an issue? Please contact me so i can fix it !**
